name: config_file_creation_and_documentation
description: Create a JSON configuration file with database and feature settings, validate required fields, and generate markdown documentation

tasks.name: Create JSON configuration file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create a file named 'app_config.json'. The JSON structure must include: 1) database object with 'host' (string) and 'port' (number), 2) cache object with 'ttl_seconds' (number), 3) feature_flags object with at least 2 boolean flags. Use realistic values (e.g., localhost, port 5432, TTL 3600). Output format: 'Successfully created app_config.json with [N] configuration sections'.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms app_config.json was created and mentions configuration sections

tasks.name: Read and validate configuration file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_read to read 'app_config.json' from task_001. Then you MUST call python_exec to write Python code that validates these required fields exist: database.host, database.port, cache.ttl_seconds, feature_flags (as object). Output the FULL raw JSON content verbatim - do NOT summarize as 'file was read' because task_003 needs the actual configuration data. Include validation results listing each required field as PRESENT or MISSING. Output format: 'Validation: PASS/FAIL' line, followed by 'Required fields: [list]', followed by complete JSON file contents.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains validation status, list of required fields checked, and complete JSON content from the file

tasks.name: Generate documentation markdown
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create 'config_docs.md'. Extract the configuration values from task_002's output (which contains the full JSON). Create a markdown document with: 1) # Configuration Documentation header, 2) ## Database Settings section describing host and port with their actual values from task_002, 3) ## Cache Settings section describing ttl_seconds, 4) ## Feature Flags section listing each flag and its state. Do NOT invent values - use only what appears in task_002's output. If a value is not found in task_002, write 'Value not found in config'. Output format: 'Created config_docs.md with [N] setting descriptions'.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms config_docs.md was created and specifies number of settings documented
